steps.t: There are boxes hidden all around Tyl Ruinen, and one of them contains the solution to Rumming's riddle. The riddle goes: Fluttering shreds rent from …
Humfrey Rumming is by the ruins of Tollobel on Tyl Ruinen. You have obtained the token of the bat from a chest on Tyl Ruinen. Bring it back to Humfrey…
